message:
chore(conformance): refresh artifact catalogues for 16 newly-exported symbols (3980 -> 3996)

Routine artifact refresh after the new-symbol wave (commit 9b51c815)
landed: support_matrix.json, the tests/conformance/*.v1.json reports,
the tests/cve_arena/results trees, and the tests/release dossier all
re-rendered from a fresh harness run. Same shape as prior batch
refreshes; this one's headline is the export-count bump from 3980 to
3996 with all 16 newcomers classified Implemented.

support_matrix.json (canonical export catalogue, ~+159 entries):
- total_exported: 3980 -> 3996.
- New entries (alphabetical): __b64_ntop, __b64_pton, b64_ntop,
  b64_pton, errc, freezero, getbsize, posix_close, recallocarray,
  strmode, strnstr, timingsafe_bcmp, timingsafe_memcmp, vwarnc,
  warnc, verrc. Each carries strict_semantics + hardened_semantics
  prose, perf_class (mostly coldpath), default_stub: false, and the
  module assignment matching the abi-side host (glibc_internal_abi
  for the resolver / b64 family, stdlib_abi for getbsize / freezero
  / recallocarray, etc.).

tests/conformance/ (39 files):
- conformance_coverage_snapshot: total_symbols 3980 -> 3996,
  symbols_with_fixtures 277 -> 278, total_fixture_cases 1053 -> 1065.
  err_abi.total 8 -> 12 (the new errc / warnc / verrc / vwarnc).
- callthrough_census, claim_reconciliation_report, closure_sweep,
  conformance_matrix, cross_report_consistency, errno_edge_report,
  feature_parity_drift_diagnostics, feature_parity_gap_bead_coverage,
  feature_parity_gap_ledger, fixture_pipeline, fixture_unit_tests,
  fuzz_harness_architecture, fuzz_membrane_validation,
  fuzz_phase{1,2}_targets, hard_parts_truth_table, packaging_spec,
  per_symbol_fixture_tests, perf_budget_policy,
  perf_regression_prevention, reality_report, replacement_levels,
  reverse_round_contracts, stub_census, support_matrix_maintenance,
  alien_cs_e2e_{report,trace}: each carries a generated_at refresh
  plus delta lines that move when the export catalogue changes
  (totals, sums, drift diagnostics, fixtures touching new symbols).
- fixtures/stdlib_numeric.json: new fixture cases for getbsize.

tests/cve_arena/ (45 files across bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2,
bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy, ...):
- artifact_index.json: generated_at refresh + sha256 lines for the
  artifacts that move when the underlying scenario harness re-runs.
- trace.jsonl, report.json, hardened/*-stderr.txt, strict/*-stderr.txt,
  uaf_adversarial_detection, paired_mode_evidence,
  integer_overflow_validation, uaf_validation: per-bead trace and
  report rotation. None of the verdict bits (PASS/FAIL, evidence
  thresholds) flip; this is purely metadata + content-hash refresh.

tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json:
- generated_at + sha256 + size_bytes for the rolled-up dossier;
  status / verdict stay at "pass" / "PASS".

.gitignore additions (case-runner binary patterns):
- tests/conformance/conformance-matrix-case-runner-*.bin
- tests/conformance/*-case-runner-*.bin
The conformance harness emits per-batch ELF case-runner binaries
(typically 80-100 MB) into tests/conformance/ as it shells out to
the per-symbol fixture executors. They had no ignore coverage; an
earlier draft of this commit accidentally staged a 96 MB
conformance-matrix-case-runner-86085.bin alongside the JSON
refresh. That artifact has no business in git history (build-output
shape, plain ELF). The patterns close the loophole.

Why the hashes move on a re-run: the harness embeds a generated_at
wall-clock and a few derived fingerprints (per-artifact sha256 over
content that includes the timestamp) in each report; downstream
report consumers like the dossier validator then re-checksum, so a
single new export ripples through ~85 hash fields. Structural
contracts (verdicts, counts, schema_version, gate thresholds) are
unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
